raw.objective: “to estimate valproic acid (VPA) clearance values for adult patients with epilepsy, using serum concentrations gathered during their routine clinical care.”
raw.covariates: Tested: DDVPA, SEX, WT, Comedication (CBZ, PHT, PHB) Included: WT, DDVPA, CBZ, PHT, PHB
raw.observations: Inter-individual plus residual variability’s, remaining in the final model, render these dosage predictions imprecise. Cpred vs Cobs plot shows moderate distribution of points along the unit line., slight over prediction of the final model is seen. Results show that VPA clearance increased linearly with TBW, but increases nonlinearly with increasing VPA daily dose. Concomitant administration of CBZ, PHT and PB led to a significant increase in VPA clearance.
raw.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
raw.equations: CL = (theta1*WT*(DMGKG**theta2)*(theta3**CBZ)*(theta4**PHT)* (theta5**PHB))*(1+eta1) KA = theta6 V = theta7*WT Cobs=Cipred+eps1 DMGKG: daily dose VPA in mg/kg/day WT: Total body weight (kg) CBZ: comedication carbamazepine (1:yes, 0:no) PHT: comedication phenytoin (1:yes, 0:no) PHB: comedication phenobarbital (1:yes, 0:no)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.004 theta2=0.304 theta3=1.363 theta4=1.541 theta5=1.397 theta6=1.2 theta7=0.2 omega1= 0.0547 sigma1= 11.4

extraction_target.title: Population estimation of valproic acid clearance in adult patients using routine clinical pharmacokinetic data.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL = (theta1*WT*(DMGKG**theta2)*(theta3**CBZ)*(theta4**PHT)* (theta5**PHB))*(1+eta1) KA = theta6 V = theta7*WT Cobs=Cipred+eps1 DMGKG: daily dose VPA in mg/kg/day WT: Total body weight (kg) CBZ: comedication carbamazepine (1:yes, 0:no) PHT: comedication phenytoin (1:yes, 0:no) PHB: comedication phenobarbital (1:yes, 0:no)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
study.objective: “to estimate valproic acid (VPA) clearance values for adult patients with epilepsy, using serum concentrations gathered during their routine clinical care.”

covariates.raw: Tested: DDVPA, SEX, WT, Comedication (CBZ, PHT, PHB) Included: WT, DDVPA, CBZ, PHT, PHB

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
